message:
fix(clippy): address trailing-comma, mul_add, map_or, and pattern-guard lints

Remove trailing commas inside format!() and assert!() macro invocations that
trigger clippy::trailing_empty_formats across 7 files:
- obligation/{leak_check,no_aliasing_proof,no_leak_proof,saga}.rs
- examples/demo_delta_debug.rs, tests/{calm_saga_integration,common/payloads}.rs

Replace a += b * c with b.mul_add(c, a) for clippy::suboptimal_flops across
4 files:
- src/messaging/ir.rs: storage_amplification accumulation (2 sites)
- src/observability/spectral_health.rs: autocovariance, value_variance,
  distance-covariance inner loop (5 sites)
- src/runtime/scheduler/three_lane.rs: Shannon entropy accumulation
- tests/ci_regression_gates.rs: microsecond elapsed accumulation (6 sites)

Replace .map().unwrap_or() with .map_or() in src/messaging/fabric.rs
sorting closure (2 sites) for clippy::map_unwrap_or.

Collapse if-inside-match-arm into match guard in
src/net/quic_native/forensic_log.rs for clippy::collapsible_match.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
